items.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.

items.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
items.summary: TechCrunch AI 关注了「The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier」。原文要点：Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership.
